  • Uses of Projection in st.orm

    Methods in st.orm with type parameters of type Projection
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <P extends Projection<ID>, ID>
    Ref<P>
    Ref.of(P projection, ID id)
    Creates a fully loaded ref instance that wraps the given projection along with its primary key.
    static <ID, P extends Projection<ID>>
    ID
    Ref.projectionId(Ref<P> ref)
    Extracts the primary key from the given projection ref returning a type-safe id.

    Modifier and Type
    Interface

    interface 
    ProjectionRepository<P extends Projection<ID>,ID>
    Provides a generic interface with read operations for projections.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends Projection<ID>, ID>
    ProjectionRepository<T,ID>
    RepositoryLookup.projection(Class<T> type)
    Returns the repository for the given projection type.
